sizing_rule.note: Mean-variance portfolio optimization: solve covariance matrix system for optimal weights X₁...Xₙ given target expected return E. Weights minimize portfolio variance via Lagrangian method (elementary row operations to identity matrix). This is Markowitz mean-variance framework, mathematically equivalent to optimal f in multi-asset context. Author (Vince) parameters not specified in excerpt.

source_rule_text: Allocate portfolio weights to individual positions by solving a system of linear equations that minimizes portfolio variance for a specified expected return level.
